name: Spireon Fleet Intelligence API (Solera)
what_it_does: Spireon Fleet Intelligence REST API for commercial vehicle and trailer telematics. Enables AI agents to manage real-time vehicle and trailer GPS tracking for transportation operations, handle ELD and HOS compliance for FMCSA DOT regulatory management, access driver behavior and safety scoring for fleet safety programs, retrieve asset utilization and idle time analytics for fleet efficiency, manage predictive maintenance and vehicle health monitoring for fleet maintenance, handle cargo monitoring and reefer temperature tracking for cold chain logistics, access geofence and zone management for asset monitoring, retrieve dispatch and route management workflow data for logistics coordination, manage theft detection and recovery data for asset protection, and integrate Spireon telematics with TMS, dispatch, and fleet management platforms.
use_cases: Tracking trailers and assets from logistics management agents
Monitoring HOS from DOT compliance agents
Managing cargo temperature from cold chain agents
Optimizing fleet utilization from efficiency agents
not_for: Passenger vehicle tracking without commercial fleet focus
Maritime or rail without road vehicle telematics context
Small fleets without trailer and asset tracking requirements
best_when: A trucking carrier or logistics company using Spireon wants AI agents to automate trailer tracking, HOS compliance, cargo monitoring, driver safety, and fleet analytics.
avoid_when: DOT COMPLIANCE RISK: Spireon ELD HOS automation must comply with FMCSA 49 CFR Part 395 — automated HOS edits require driver acknowledgment. Spireon was acquired by Solera Holdings (2021) and is being integrated into Solera's fleet intelligence platform; API roadmap and product direction subject to Solera consolidation. Reefer temperature monitoring automation creates cold chain food safety responsibility — automated temperature alerts without human response protocol creates liability.

auth.notes: Spireon uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Webhooks for fleet events. REST API with JSON. Nashville, Tennessee HQ. Solera Holdings subsidiary (acquired 2021). Spireon founded 2000. 2.5M+ connected assets. Strong in trailer tracking, reefer monitoring, and trucking ELD. Competes with Samsara, Geotab, and Verizon Connect for commercial fleet telematics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-device monthly subscription
pricing.notes: Nashville. Spireon (Solera Holdings). Solera acquired 2021. 2.5M+ connected devices. Trailer and reefer tracking specialty. Competes with Samsara, Geotab, and Verizon Connect for fleet telematics.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: DOT COMPLIANCE RISK: ELD HOS edits require FMCSA-compliant driver acknowledgment; automated log modification without driver confirmation creates 49 CFR violation
Solera acquisition integration — Spireon acquired by Solera 2021; API may be consolidated with Solera fleet intelligence platform; verify current API roadmap
Reefer temperature monitoring liability — cold chain cargo temperature alerts create food safety responsibility; automated temperature response protocol must include human escalation
Trailer tracking GPS accuracy — trailer GPS ping frequency varies by subscription tier; low-frequency pinging creates location lag for real-time logistics automation
Cargo sensor integration — Spireon cargo monitoring sensors have different data models from vehicle telematics; separate integration paths for vehicle tracking vs. cargo monitoring
agent_readiness.security_notes: Fleet telematics. SOC2, FMCSA-ELD. OAuth2/API key. US. Vehicle, trailer, and cargo data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Fleet telematics. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Vehicle and cargo data.
